entities.description: Angle formed by lines from the highest point of the anterior process and posterior tuberosity of the calcaneus through the posterior facet.

metadata.normal_range_text: approximately 20-40 degrees (source-version dependent)
metadata.decision_threshold_text: decreased angle suggests calcaneal compression/collapse
metadata.description: Angle formed by lines from the highest point of the anterior process and posterior tuberosity of the calcaneus through the posterior facet.

entities.description: Critical angle of Gissane at the intersection of the anterior and posterior facets of the calcaneus.

metadata.normal_range_text: approximately 120-145 degrees (source-version dependent)
metadata.decision_threshold_text: abnormal angle supports articular calcaneal injury
metadata.description: Critical angle of Gissane at the intersection of the anterior and posterior facets of the calcaneus.

entities.description: Angle between the humeral shaft axis and the capitellar physeal line on AP elbow radiograph.

metadata.normal_range_text: approximately 64-81 degrees with side-to-side comparison preferred
metadata.decision_threshold_text: asymmetric Baumann angle suggests coronal malalignment after supracondylar injury
metadata.description: Angle between the humeral shaft axis and the capitellar physeal line on AP elbow radiograph.

entities.description: Line drawn along the anterior humeral cortex on lateral elbow radiograph relating to the capitellum.

metadata.normal_range_text: intersects middle third of capitellum in most children (age-dependent)
metadata.decision_threshold_text: anterior translation relative to capitellum suggests extension-type supracondylar displacement
metadata.description: Line drawn along the anterior humeral cortex on lateral elbow radiograph relating to the capitellum.

entities.description: Line along the radial shaft/neck that should intersect the capitellum on orthogonal elbow views.

metadata.normal_range_text: intersects capitellum on AP and lateral views
metadata.decision_threshold_text: failure to intersect capitellum indicates radiocapitellar dislocation/subluxation
metadata.description: Line along the radial shaft/neck that should intersect the capitellum on orthogonal elbow views.

entities.description: Relative length of the distal ulna compared with the distal radius articular surface.

metadata.normal_range_text: near-neutral variance is common; population and technique dependent
metadata.decision_threshold_text: positive or negative variance alters ulnar-sided load and DRUJ interpretation
metadata.description: Relative length of the distal ulna compared with the distal radius articular surface.

entities.description: Sagittal inclination of the distal radial articular surface relative to the radial shaft.

metadata.normal_range_text: approximately 11 degrees volar (source-version dependent)
metadata.decision_threshold_text: dorsal angulation beyond accepted thresholds influences instability and fixation goals
metadata.description: Sagittal inclination of the distal radial articular surface relative to the radial shaft.

entities.description: Frontal inclination of the distal radial articular surface relative to the radial shaft.

metadata.normal_range_text: approximately 22-23 degrees (source-version dependent)
metadata.decision_threshold_text: loss of inclination contributes to radial deformity assessment
metadata.description: Frontal inclination of the distal radial articular surface relative to the radial shaft.

entities.description: Vertical distance from ulnar articular surface to radial styloid tip on PA wrist radiograph.

metadata.normal_range_text: approximately 11-12 mm (source-version dependent)
metadata.decision_threshold_text: shortening is a key distal radius instability and outcome parameter
metadata.description: Vertical distance from ulnar articular surface to radial styloid tip on PA wrist radiograph.

entities.description: Horizontal overlap of tibia and fibula on AP or mortise ankle radiograph at the syndesmosis.

metadata.normal_range_text: technique- and view-specific minimum overlap thresholds
metadata.decision_threshold_text: reduced overlap raises concern for syndesmotic injury
metadata.description: Horizontal overlap of tibia and fibula on AP or mortise ankle radiograph at the syndesmosis.

entities.description: Distance between medial fibular border and incisural surface of the tibia at a defined level above the plafond.

metadata.normal_range_text: commonly cited upper bounds near 6 mm (view- and method-dependent)
metadata.decision_threshold_text: widened clear space supports syndesmotic diastasis evaluation
metadata.description: Distance between medial fibular border and incisural surface of the tibia at a defined level above the plafond.

entities.description: Distance between medial malleolus and medial talus on mortise radiograph.

metadata.normal_range_text: commonly compared with superior clear space; absolute cutoffs are source-version dependent
metadata.decision_threshold_text: widening suggests deltoid incompetence or mortise instability
metadata.description: Distance between medial malleolus and medial talus on mortise radiograph.

entities.description: Weight-bearing limb axis from hip center through knee to ankle center used for coronal alignment assessment.

metadata.normal_range_text: near-neutral mechanical axis with population-specific ranges
metadata.decision_threshold_text: deviation guides osteotomy, arthroplasty, and deformity planning
metadata.description: Weight-bearing limb axis from hip center through knee to ankle center used for coronal alignment assessment.

entities.description: Family of coronal and sagittal alignment parameters used across trauma and reconstruction.

metadata.normal_range_text: region- and modality-specific
metadata.decision_threshold_text: alignment thresholds change reduction and construct goals
metadata.description: Family of coronal and sagittal alignment parameters used across trauma and reconstruction.

entities.description: Ratio of patellar tendon length to patellar length on lateral knee radiograph.

metadata.normal_range_text: approximately 0.8-1.2 (method-dependent)
metadata.decision_threshold_text: elevated ratio suggests patella alta; reduced ratio suggests patella baja
metadata.description: Ratio of patellar tendon length to patellar length on lateral knee radiograph.

entities.description: Ratio of articular patellar surface distance to tibial plateau over patellar articular length.

metadata.normal_range_text: approximately 0.6-1.3 (source-version dependent)
metadata.decision_threshold_text: used for patellar height assessment independent of patellar morphology
metadata.description: Ratio of articular patellar surface distance to tibial plateau over patellar articular length.

entities.description: Tibial tubercle to trochlear groove distance measured on axial CT or MRI.

metadata.normal_range_text: commonly cited risk thresholds near 15-20 mm are method- and population-dependent
metadata.decision_threshold_text: increased TT-TG contributes to lateralization risk assessment
metadata.description: Tibial tubercle to trochlear groove distance measured on axial CT or MRI.

entities.description: Angle between femoral neck axis and the point where femoral head-neck asphericity begins on oblique axial imaging.

metadata.normal_range_text: commonly cited thresholds near 50-55 degrees are source- and plane-dependent
metadata.decision_threshold_text: elevated alpha angle supports cam-type femoroacetabular impingement morphology
metadata.description: Angle between femoral neck axis and the point where femoral head-neck asphericity begins on oblique axial imaging.

entities.description: Angle between vertical line through femoral head center and line to lateral acetabular sourcil.

metadata.normal_range_text: commonly >25 degrees normal; 20-25 borderline; <20 dysplasia (source-version dependent)
metadata.decision_threshold_text: reduced LCEA supports undercoverage/dysplasia evaluation
metadata.description: Angle between vertical line through femoral head center and line to lateral acetabular sourcil.

entities.description: Acetabular inclination angle of the weight-bearing sourcil relative to horizontal.

metadata.normal_range_text: commonly <10 degrees (source-version dependent)
metadata.decision_threshold_text: elevated Tönnis angle supports acetabular dysplasia morphology
metadata.description: Acetabular inclination angle of the weight-bearing sourcil relative to horizontal.

entities.description: Superior distance between acromion and humeral head on AP or outlet shoulder radiograph.

metadata.normal_range_text: commonly >7 mm; reduced values raise concern for rotator cuff deficiency (source-version dependent)
metadata.decision_threshold_text: narrow AHI suggests superior migration from massive cuff pathology
metadata.description: Superior distance between acromion and humeral head on AP or outlet shoulder radiograph.

entities.description: Angle between glenoid plane and line from inferior glenoid to lateral acromial edge.

metadata.normal_range_text: commonly cited mid-range near 30-35 degrees with higher values linked to cuff risk (source-version dependent)
metadata.decision_threshold_text: extreme CSA values associate with cuff tear versus osteoarthritis patterns
metadata.description: Angle between glenoid plane and line from inferior glenoid to lateral acromial edge.

entities.description: Radiographic comparison of limb lengths using pelvic reference lines and lesser trochanters or full-length films.

metadata.normal_range_text: side-to-side difference near zero; clinical tolerance is goal- and patient-specific
metadata.decision_threshold_text: unplanned LLD after arthroplasty is a key reconstruction quality metric
metadata.description: Radiographic comparison of limb lengths using pelvic reference lines and lesser trochanters or full-length films.

entities.description: Perpendicular distance from femoral head center to femoral shaft axis.

metadata.normal_range_text: patient-specific; restoration relative to native or contralateral side
metadata.decision_threshold_text: under- or over-restoration affects abductor tension and stability
metadata.description: Perpendicular distance from femoral head center to femoral shaft axis.

entities.description: Abduction angle of the acetabular component relative to the transverse pelvic axis.

metadata.normal_range_text: commonly discussed safe zones near 30-50 degrees are contested and source-version dependent
metadata.decision_threshold_text: extreme inclination contributes to instability and wear risk assessment
metadata.description: Abduction angle of the acetabular component relative to the transverse pelvic axis.

entities.description: Forward opening of the acetabular component measured on cross-table lateral, CT, or calculated methods.

metadata.normal_range_text: method-dependent; commonly discussed mid-range values are contested
metadata.decision_threshold_text: version extremes contribute to dislocation and impingement risk
metadata.description: Forward opening of the acetabular component measured on cross-table lateral, CT, or calculated methods.

entities.description: Restoration of the reconstructed femoral head center relative to native or planned hip center.

metadata.normal_range_text: goal is anatomic or planned restoration within reconstruction constraints
metadata.decision_threshold_text: superior/lateralization alters offset, length, and joint reaction force
metadata.description: Restoration of the reconstructed femoral head center relative to native or planned hip center.

entities.description: Coronal arthroplasty alignment strategy targeting neutral mechanical axis relationships.

metadata.normal_range_text: target corridors are construct- and philosophy-specific
metadata.decision_threshold_text: outliers from planned mechanical targets alter load distribution
metadata.description: Coronal arthroplasty alignment strategy targeting neutral mechanical axis relationships.

entities.description: Restoration of native or planned joint line height after knee or hip reconstruction.

metadata.normal_range_text: patient-specific native joint line references
metadata.decision_threshold_text: joint-line elevation or depression affects kinematics and extensor mechanism
metadata.description: Restoration of native or planned joint line height after knee or hip reconstruction.

entities.description: Family of hip-knee-ankle and component coronal parameters used in reconstruction.

metadata.normal_range_text: philosophy- and patient-specific corridors
metadata.decision_threshold_text: coronal outliers influence polyethylene load and longevity discussions
metadata.description: Family of hip-knee-ankle and component coronal parameters used in reconstruction.

entities.description: Angle between endplates of the most tilted proximal and distal vertebrae of a curve.

metadata.normal_range_text: curve magnitude thresholds for observation versus treatment are age- and etiology-specific
metadata.decision_threshold_text: Cobb magnitude drives scoliosis surveillance and treatment thresholds
metadata.description: Angle between endplates of the most tilted proximal and distal vertebrae of a curve.

entities.description: Angle between perpendicular to sacral endplate at its midpoint and line to femoral head axis.

metadata.normal_range_text: morphologic constant with wide population range
metadata.decision_threshold_text: PI sets the target framework for PT and SS relationships
metadata.description: Angle between perpendicular to sacral endplate at its midpoint and line to femoral head axis.

entities.description: Angle between vertical and the line from sacral endplate midpoint to femoral head axis.

metadata.normal_range_text: compensatory ranges are age- and deformity-specific
metadata.decision_threshold_text: elevated PT indicates pelvic retroversion compensation
metadata.description: Angle between vertical and the line from sacral endplate midpoint to femoral head axis.

entities.description: Angle between sacral endplate and horizontal reference.

metadata.normal_range_text: related to PI and PT by PI ≈ PT + SS
metadata.decision_threshold_text: abnormal SS contributes to sagittal imbalance analysis
metadata.description: Angle between sacral endplate and horizontal reference.

entities.description: Horizontal offset of C7 plumb line from the posterosuperior sacral corner.

metadata.normal_range_text: near-neutral to small positive offset; thresholds are age-dependent
metadata.decision_threshold_text: increased positive SVA indicates global sagittal malalignment
metadata.description: Horizontal offset of C7 plumb line from the posterosuperior sacral corner.

entities.description: Family of cervical parameters including lordosis and chin-brow / C2-C7 relationships.

metadata.normal_range_text: age- and method-specific
metadata.decision_threshold_text: cervical malalignment affects horizontal gaze and myelopathy planning
metadata.description: Family of cervical parameters including lordosis and chin-brow / C2-C7 relationships.

entities.description: Horizontal offset of C7 plumb line from the central sacral vertical line.

metadata.normal_range_text: near-neutral coronal balance preferred
metadata.decision_threshold_text: coronal imbalance influences deformity correction goals
metadata.description: Horizontal offset of C7 plumb line from the central sacral vertical line.

entities.description: Line along the superior femoral neck that should intersect the lateral femoral epiphysis on AP pelvis.

metadata.normal_range_text: intersects epiphysis; comparison with contralateral side recommended
metadata.decision_threshold_text: failure to intersect epiphysis raises concern for SCFE
metadata.description: Line along the superior femoral neck that should intersect the lateral femoral epiphysis on AP pelvis.

entities.description: Percent of femoral head lateral to Perkins line on AP pelvis.

metadata.normal_range_text: age- and condition-specific surveillance thresholds
metadata.decision_threshold_text: progressive migration guides hip surveillance and intervention timing
metadata.description: Percent of femoral head lateral to Perkins line on AP pelvis.

entities.description: Angle between Hilgenreiner line and the acetabular roof on pediatric AP pelvis.

metadata.normal_range_text: age-dependent norms with progressive decrease after birth
metadata.decision_threshold_text: elevated AI supports DDH monitoring and treatment thresholds
metadata.description: Angle between Hilgenreiner line and the acetabular roof on pediatric AP pelvis.

entities.description: Lateral femoral head coverage angle used in older children and adolescents with age-adjusted norms.

metadata.normal_range_text: age-dependent; not interchangeable with adult thresholds without adjustment
metadata.decision_threshold_text: reduced coverage supports residual dysplasia evaluation
metadata.description: Lateral femoral head coverage angle used in older children and adolescents with age-adjusted norms.

entities.description: Radiographic relationships of physis, epiphysis, and metaphysis used to detect injury and deformity risk.

metadata.normal_range_text: age- and site-specific ossification and alignment norms
metadata.decision_threshold_text: physeal irregularity or displacement changes pediatric management urgency
metadata.description: Radiographic relationships of physis, epiphysis, and metaphysis used to detect injury and deformity risk.

claims.claimText: Obtain adequate orthogonal radiographs before escalating to advanced imaging when the clinical question is osseous alignment or fracture pattern.

metadata.sourceNote: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; numeric thresholds require human review; pediatric/spine thresholds require specialist review

claims.claimText: Weight-bearing radiographs answer functional alignment questions that non-weight-bearing studies can understate.

metadata.sourceNote: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; numeric thresholds require human review; pediatric/spine thresholds require specialist review

claims.claimText: Stress radiographs are reserved for dynamic instability questions not answered by static views.

metadata.sourceNote: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; numeric thresholds require human review; pediatric/spine thresholds require specialist review

claims.claimText: Imaging escalation is driven by the unresolved clinical question, not by modality availability alone.

metadata.sourceNote: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; numeric thresholds require human review; pediatric/spine thresholds require specialist review

claims.claimText: CT is used for multiplanar osseous mapping and measurement when radiographs incompletely define articular or complex fracture morphology.

metadata.sourceNote: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; numeric thresholds require human review; pediatric/spine thresholds require specialist review

claims.claimText: MRI is preferred when soft-tissue, cartilage, marrow, or neural integrity changes management.

metadata.sourceNote: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; numeric thresholds require human review; pediatric/spine thresholds require specialist review

claims.claimText: Böhler angle is measured on a true lateral hindfoot radiograph and reduced values support calcaneal compression assessment.

metadata.sourceNote: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; numeric thresholds require human review; pediatric/spine thresholds require specialist review

claims.claimText: Gissane angle complements Böhler angle for posterior facet geometry and should not be used interchangeably.

metadata.sourceNote: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; numeric thresholds require human review; pediatric/spine thresholds require specialist review

claims.claimText: On a true lateral pediatric elbow radiograph, the anterior humeral line relationship to the capitellum screens extension-type supracondylar displacement.

metadata.sourceNote: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; numeric thresholds require human review; pediatric/spine thresholds require specialist review

claims.claimText: The radiocapitellar line should intersect the capitellum on both AP and lateral views; a normal relationship on one view does not exclude dislocation.

metadata.sourceNote: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; numeric thresholds require human review; pediatric/spine thresholds require specialist review

claims.claimText: Distal radius radiographic assessment includes volar tilt, radial inclination, radial height, and ulnar variance with technique-matched normals.

metadata.sourceNote: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; numeric thresholds require human review; pediatric/spine thresholds require specialist review

claims.claimText: Ankle mortise interpretation includes medial clear space, tibiofibular clear space, and tibiofibular overlap using consistent landmarks.

metadata.sourceNote: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; numeric thresholds require human review; pediatric/spine thresholds require specialist review

claims.claimText: Patellar height ratios are method-specific; Insall-Salvati and Caton-Deschamps are not interchangeable without stating the method.

metadata.sourceNote: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; numeric thresholds require human review; pediatric/spine thresholds require specialist review

claims.claimText: TT-TG distance requires standardized axial landmarks and should be interpreted with trochlear morphology and soft-tissue stabilizers.

metadata.sourceNote: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; numeric thresholds require human review; pediatric/spine thresholds require specialist review

claims.claimText: Alpha angle thresholds are plane- and source-dependent; report the imaging plane with the numeric value.

metadata.sourceNote: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; numeric thresholds require human review; pediatric/spine thresholds require specialist review

claims.claimText: Lateral center-edge and Tönnis angles describe acetabular coverage and inclination and must use a standardized AP pelvis.

metadata.sourceNote: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; numeric thresholds require human review; pediatric/spine thresholds require specialist review

claims.claimText: Reduced acromiohumeral interval supports superior humeral migration and massive cuff deficiency assessment, not isolated impingement diagnosis.

metadata.sourceNote: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; numeric thresholds require human review; pediatric/spine thresholds require specialist review

claims.claimText: THA radiographic quality metrics include cup inclination, cup anteversion, offset, hip center, and leg-length relationships.

metadata.sourceNote: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; numeric thresholds require human review; pediatric/spine thresholds require specialist review

claims.claimText: Mechanical alignment targets are planning philosophies; report the reference axis and component corridor used.

metadata.sourceNote: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; numeric thresholds require human review; pediatric/spine thresholds require specialist review

claims.claimText: Cobb angle requires identifiable end vertebrae on a standing radiograph and remains a draft threshold until specialist review.

metadata.sourceNote: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; numeric thresholds require human review; pediatric/spine thresholds require specialist review

claims.claimText: Pelvic incidence is a morphologic constant that frames pelvic tilt and sacral slope relationships in sagittal analysis.

metadata.sourceNote: Imaging & Radiographic Measurements manufacture; numeric thresholds require human review; pediatric/spine thresholds require specialist review

claims.claimText: Sagittal vertical axis quantifies global sagittal alignment and must be age-contextualized before treatment thresholds are applied.

claims.claimText: A Klein line that misses the epiphysis is concerning for SCFE, but a normal Klein line does not exclude mild slip; use frog-lateral comparison.

claims.claimText: Acetabular index norms are age-dependent; adult center-edge thresholds must not be applied to infants without adjustment.

claims.claimText: Quantitative thresholds require units, population context, measurement method, and source version before publication.

decisionPoints.trigger: Key anatomy is rotated, truncated, or not profiled on the initial radiographs
decisionPoints.action: Repeat orthogonal or indicated special views before definitive measurement or disposition

decisionPoints.trigger: Radiographs leave articular surface, column, or multiplanar morphology unresolved and management depends on that detail
decisionPoints.action: Escalate to CT with multiplanar reconstruction and document the unanswered clinical question

decisionPoints.trigger: Soft-tissue, cartilage, neural, or occult injury findings would change immobilization, surgery, or clearance
decisionPoints.action: Obtain MRI when safe and available; do not delay limb- or cord-threatening care for elective advanced imaging

decisionPoints.trigger: True lateral hindfoot radiograph shows a decreased Böhler angle after calcaneal injury
decisionPoints.action: Treat as evidence of calcaneal compression; complete hindfoot series/CT as indicated and route numeric threshold confirmation to human review

decisionPoints.trigger: Mortise radiograph shows widened medial clear space or syndesmotic parameters outside method-specific norms
decisionPoints.action: Protect the ankle, consider stress views or advanced imaging, and escalate for instability management after threshold review

decisionPoints.trigger: Distal radius parameters show dorsal angulation, height loss, or inclination change beyond accepted draft thresholds
decisionPoints.action: Assess stability criteria, obtain comparison/post-reduction films, and route numeric cutoffs to human review before publication

decisionPoints.trigger: Pediatric lateral elbow radiograph shows anterior humeral line not intersecting the expected capitellar third
decisionPoints.action: Treat as potential extension-type displacement, obtain adequate orthogonal views, and route to pediatric specialist review for threshold confirmation

decisionPoints.trigger: Klein line fails to intersect the lateral femoral epiphysis or frog-lateral comparison is concerning for SCFE
decisionPoints.action: Make the patient non-weight-bearing, obtain indicated orthogonal/frog-lateral imaging, and escalate urgently with pediatric specialist review

decisionPoints.trigger: Age-adjusted acetabular index or migration percentage exceeds draft surveillance thresholds
decisionPoints.action: Continue hip surveillance pathway and route all pediatric numeric thresholds to specialist review before treatment decisions are published

decisionPoints.trigger: Axial CT/MRI TT-TG exceeds draft method-specific risk thresholds in a patellar instability evaluation
decisionPoints.action: Interpret with trochlear dysplasia and soft-tissue factors; keep numeric cutoff under human review

decisionPoints.trigger: AP pelvis shows reduced lateral center-edge angle or elevated Tönnis angle suggesting undercoverage
decisionPoints.action: Correlate with clinical impingement/instability exam and keep coverage thresholds under human review

decisionPoints.trigger: Postoperative THA radiographs show cup inclination or anteversion outside the planned corridor
decisionPoints.action: Assess dislocation risk factors, obtain dedicated version imaging if needed, and keep safe-zone numbers under attending review

decisionPoints.trigger: Standing spine radiograph demonstrates a curve magnitude near observation-versus-treatment draft thresholds
decisionPoints.action: Confirm end vertebrae, technique, and age context; route all spine thresholds to specialist review

decisionPoints.trigger: Global sagittal parameters show positive sagittal imbalance relevant to reconstructive planning
decisionPoints.action: Complete spinopelvic set (PI, PT, SS, SVA) and require spine specialist review before publishing numeric targets

decisionPoints.trigger: Measurement appears abnormal but projection, rotation, or landmark selection is nonstandard
decisionPoints.action: Reject the numeric result, repeat standardized imaging, and document why the measurement is invalid
